items.description: Intensive training in Full-Stack development, working with Python, JavaScript, C#/.NET, Node.js, React, HTML/CSS, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. Experience in collaborative projects using agile methodologies (Scrum), participating in sprints, dailies, and planning. Use of version control tools like Git/GitHub.

Professional training in mechatronics with a focus on analysis and problem-solving. Solid foundation in analytical and structured thinking applicable to software development and technological solutions.
Technological training in electromechanical systems, developing technical and project management skills.
Professional technical training in electromechanical maintenance, laying foundations in technical systems and practical problem solving.
Complete secondary education with academic emphasis.

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.description: These are the tools and technologies I use to turn ideas into reality.

items.title: Firmness - Machinery Management
items.description: Fullstack solution developed for comprehensive inventory, client, and sales management in the construction and machinery rental sector. Based on Clean Architecture and distributed architecture.

items.title: Tekus - Provider REST API
items.description: Backend technical test with DDD architecture and Clean Architecture in .NET 8. REST API documented with Swagger, API Key authentication, efficient dynamic search and pagination. 100% covered with unit tests using xUnit and Moq.
